name: souroldgeezer-design
description: Reference-driven design skills for sustainable software, web frontend application design, HTTP APIs, and infrastructure. Covers code/module/script boundaries and dependencies, app routes/screens/component architecture/state/data/rendering/responsive/accessibility/performance posture, HTTP API design with Azure® Functions™ runtime, Node.js® hosted/serverless and hosted Next.js™ runtime extensions, Azure® Cosmos DB™ / Azure® Blob Storage™ data extensions, infrastructure/IaC design with Azure®, Terraform™, and Bicep™ extensions, matching Claude Code subagents, and Codex skill metadata.

interface.shortDescription: Reference-driven software, app, API, and infrastructure design.
interface.longDescription: Build, extract, review, and look up sustainable software design, web frontend app design, API design, and infrastructure/IaC design guidance with bundled references.
defaultPrompt: Review this module design for coupling and boundary risks.
Review this app, API, or infrastructure design against the matching reference.
Design or review this API contract, infrastructure, or implementation surface.
